create(string,string,(address,uint8,addr.details: Tokens must be sorted for pool registration.

params.name: The name of the pool
params.normalizedWeights: The pool weights (must sum to FixedPoint.ONE)
params.roleAccounts: Addresses the Vault will allow to change certain pool settings
params.salt: The salt value that will be passed to deployment
params.tokens: An array of descriptors for the tokens the pool will manage

returns.trustedCowRouter: Address of the trusted CoW AMM Router.

setTrustedCowRouter(address).details: This permissioned function ensures that the new trusted router address is non-zero.

params.newTrustedCowRouter: Address of new trusted CoW AMM Router.

getTrustedCowRouter().notice: Gets the current trusted CoW Router in the factory.

setTrustedCowRouter(address).notice: Sets the current trusted CoW Router in the factory.
